info.title: Tourism Backend API
info.description: Machine-readable API contract. Step 1 includes shared metadata/components only; path registration follows in later steps.

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh cookie
post.description: Uses refresh token from cookie and rotates session tokens.

401.description: No refresh token or invalid refresh token.

get.description: Supports controlled filtering, search, sorting, and cursor pagination. Cursor key is based on active sort key plus id tie-breaker.

400.description: Invalid query combination or unsupported value.

get.description: Distance-based endpoint retained for transition. Uses cursor pagination ordered by distance, id.
Cursor pagination ordered by createdAt ASC, id ASC.

get.summary: Get paginated reviews for a place
get.description: Cursor pagination uses keyset ordering on createdAt DESC, id DESC.

post.summary: Save a place for current user

delete.summary: Delete saved place for current user

get.summary: Get paginated saved places for current user
get.description: Cursor pagination uses keyset ordering on saved timestamp, placeId.
